flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College for Creative Studies fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College for Creative Studies rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.6k → $53.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College for Creative Studies rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.6k → $53.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College for Creative Studies fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
